article_title: Unif. Vehicle Certificate of Title Act

markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 10
#### Article 46. Unif. Vehicle Certificate of Title Act
##### § 2106 — Examination of records

The commissioner, upon receiving application for a first certificate of title, shall check the identifying number of the vehicle and the name or other identifier of the owner shown in the application against the appropriate records of vehicles required to be maintained.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
